name: Everything is Awful
description:
She was not ready for life, she wasn't ready For anything. She made a sucker's prayer and sadly no one responded....

Author's note: look, I said it was going to be fluff but god, I feel like the angst bots keep calling me. I mean you technically can make this wholesome . I'm also into The Decemberists. I'll be your girl is such an amazing album!

Two bots in one day, I must be crazy!

Everything is awful and I hope you give me feedback ;)

Images from the cutting room floor...
creator: TheExSoul
